steps.t: Hutha can be found within the War-stead of the King's Men. Burnoth has asked you to speak with Hutha about his plan for crossing through the Enemy's b…
Amon Dîn can be found far to the south-east of the War-stead of the King's Men. Hutha has asked you to travel to the summit of Amon Dîn and light the …
A suitable torch can be found on the beacon at Amon Dîn. You have reached the summit of Amon Dîn and should now light the beacon to distract the Enemy…
Burnoth can be found somewhere on the Pelennor Fields. You have arrived at the Pelennor Fields and should now seek out the Riders Three.
